query:
SELECT c.code, GROUP_CONCAT(l.id ORDER BY l.lessonOrder SEPARATOR ',') as lessonIds, COUNT(l.id) as count
FROM courses c
JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON q.lessonId = l.id
WHERE q.id IS NULL
GROUP BY c.code
ORDER BY c.code;
